key_points: Mobile app development is on schedule.

decisions: Mobile app development is on schedule.

action_items.task: Conduct additional testing for the payment module

stage3.summary: The meeting focused on the progress of the mobile app development, confirming that it is on schedule and that the login feature has been completed. However, it was noted that the payment module requires additional testing, which has been assigned to Noah.
action_list: Conduct additional testing for the payment module (Owner: Noah)

follow_up_email.subject: Meeting Summary and Action Items
follow_up_email.body:
Dear Team,

Thank you for your participation in today's meeting. We are pleased to note that the mobile app development is on schedule and that the login feature has been successfully completed. However, please be aware that the payment module requires additional testing, which Noah will be taking care of.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
